CREATE TABLE coins (
            symbol TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            name TEXT,
            category TEXT DEFAULT 'unknown',
            sub_category TEXT DEFAULT '',
            first_seen TEXT,
            last_seen TEXT,
            scan_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            signal_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            avg_score REAL DEFAULT 0,
            max_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            dominant_direction TEXT DEFAULT '',
            long_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            short_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            avg_volume_24h REAL DEFAULT 0,
            best_strategies TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
            regime_history TEXT DEFAULT '[]',
            notes TEXT DEFAULT ''
        )

CREATE TABLE signals (
            id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
            cycle INTEGER,
            timestamp TEXT,
            symbol TEXT,
            direction TEXT,
            score INTEGER,
            last_price REAL,
            entry REAL,
            tp REAL,
            sl REAL,
            atr REAL,
            rsi REAL,
            mfi REAL,
            williams_r REAL,
            adx REAL,
            cmf REAL,
            chaikin_osc REAL,
            obv_trend TEXT,
            macd_signal TEXT,
            bb_squeeze INTEGER,
            regime TEXT,
            funding_rate REAL,
            change_24h REAL,
            volume_24h REAL,
            liquidity_bias TEXT,
            strategies TEXT,
            reasons TEXT,
            ob_analysis TEXT, tp1 REAL, tp2 REAL, tp3 REAL, breakout_score INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
            FOREIGN KEY (symbol) REFERENCES coins(symbol)
        )

CREATE TABLE categories (
            id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
            label TEXT,
            description TEXT,
            keywords TEXT,
            color TEXT DEFAULT '#888'
        )

CREATE TABLE scans (
            cycle INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
            timestamp TEXT,
            coins_scanned INTEGER,
            signals_found INTEGER,
            scan_time_s REAL,
            gpu_used INTEGER,
            gpu_count INTEGER,
            top1_symbol TEXT,
            top1_score INTEGER,
            thermal_max INTEGER DEFAULT 0
        )

CREATE TABLE trading_config (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    ts REAL NOT NULL,
    key TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    value TEXT NOT NULL
)

CREATE TABLE jarvis_system_config (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    ts REAL NOT NULL,
    key TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    value TEXT NOT NULL
)
